testCase.name: app saga init connection errored user
app saga init connection user malformed
app saga init connection right user
surveys sagas fetch survey Survey doesnt exist
surveys sagas fetch survey Survey exists
surveys sagas update survey update survey
surveys sagas delete survey survey exists, is not the current survey and have records and nodes
surveys sagas delete survey survey exists, is the current survey and have records and nodes
surveys sagas delete survey survey doesnt exists and have records and nodes
